programme.title: Joburg Open Day 4
programme.desc: The Joburg Open is a men's professional golf tournament that is held in Johannesburg, South Africa. It was launched in 2007 as a Sunshine Tour event, and has since become a permanent fixture on the schedule. It is held at the Houghton Golf Club.

programme.title: Arnold Palmer Invitational p/b Mastercard Round 4
programme.desc: The Arnold Palmer Invitational presented by Mastercard is one of the premier-event jewels on the PGA Tour. It is played at the Bay Hill Club and Lodge, a private golf resort owned since 1974 by Arnold Palmer in Bay Hill, a suburb southwest of Orlando, Florida. The winner receives a red cardigan sweater in memory of Arnold Palmer, a tradition that began with the 2017 tournament after Palmer's death

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Ching-chi abruptly has chest pain. After receiving treatment, Ching-chi insists on working while keeping Kam-kuk in the dark. Ka-chun is worried. Wai-man offers complimentary treatment to a poorly kid called Little Him and Him’s mother. Shuk-foon approaches some lawyer as she arranges for Yam-yuen’s shares to be transferred to Wai-man.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Follow Your Heart
programme.desc: While secretly investigating a case, Jiang Xin Bai, a proud prince and head constable who suffers from face blindness, meets the unorthodox Dr Yan Nan Xing, who ‘changes her appearance’ each month. They go from being at odds to solving cases together.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: If You Wish Upon Me
programme.desc: Yoon Gyeo Rye lived at an orphanage, spent time in prison, and now struggles to lead a normal life. He volunteers at a hospice, where he works alongside volunteer team leader Kang Tae Sik and nurse Seo Yeon Joo. Despite his dark past and aggressive attitude, he unknowingly seeks comfort.

programme.title: SUMPAH I LOVE YOU FULL

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Biar Ndeso Tapi Bisa Bikin Romantis
programme.desc: Dara (Andi Viola) comes from a village and is known as a hick girl. Dara comes to Jakarta to find her biological mother, but instead she meets Eza (Hardi Fadhillah). programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: REBUT PACAR SAHABAT? ASIAAAP!
programme.desc: Ara (Debi Sagita) is about to get married, but her best friend suddenly faints because she cannot accept that Ara is marrying her dream guy, Joni (Aditya Suryo). Because she cares about her friend, Ara runs away with Sam (Fauzan Nasrul). Ara, the daughter of a poor widow who works as a maid, initially tries in funny ways to win her best friend’s boyfriend-who is also the son of her mother’s employ

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Dari The Kita Belajar Rasa Penghalau Galau
programme.desc: Galih (Cakrawala Airawan) and Reva (Larasati Nugroho) always argue whenever they meet. Reva even throws away Galih’s motorcycle key, making him furious. Reva behaves that way because she is depressed after being left by her boyfriend. Ironically, Galih later becomes emotionally affected and overwhelmed by Reva’s actions.

programme.desc: Godzilla and Kong, two titans from the ancient world, join forces to face a colossal threat emerging from deep within the earth's core.

programme.title: Prometheus

programme.desc: Ancient superheroes called Eternals come together after a long time. However, they fight bad creatures named Deviants to save the Earth.

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Talented boxer Jia Yang is caught in an underground fight to clear her father's debts. As passion and obligation collide, can Jia Yang revive her abandoned boxing dream?

Now, the police must race to unravel the mystery and stop the killings before panic consumes the city.

Chen Zhen vows to take down the evil society and destroy their secret laboratory.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: In the heart of Ecuador, we sit down with Antonio Valencia as he reflects on an extraordinary journey from humble beginnings to the grand stages of world football. programme.title: PL STORIES

programme.title: MY SEASON - JAMIE VARDY: 15/16

programme.title: PL REWIND

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW

That decision became the starting point of a tragedy that changed Aira's life forever.

Fortunately, there is Diandra, a friend who never stops supporting Mutiara and encouraging her to keep going.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Our newly assembled Librarians crew investigates a mysterious dancing sickness, leading them to a showdown with a powerful magical factioneer at a professional ballet company.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Half of the Librarian team gets trapped on a runaway ghost train; can the rest of the team help in solving the unresolved business of the ghosts on board before the train completes a rampage of destruction?

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: The Librarians head to Paris after a string of robberies leaves mysteriously lovestruck victims in their wake. When they learn that a magical love artefact is behind the thefts, they enlist help from Vikram's old friend -- Cupid himself.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: The team goes to a college campus with a world-class observatory to discover who is using the Crystal of Dr. John Dee to steal people's memories, in order to own the future.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: When the magic door reroutes Charlie, Lysa and Connor to a bizarre manor where a series of Agatha Christie-style murders take place, they must figure out whodunit, while Vikram tries to track them down with the help of a mysterious tarot card reader.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Connor is forced to reconnect with people from his pre-Library life, and must defeat an old adversary who has grown powerful in his absence.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: After a wild bachelorette party with Lysa's childhood best friend, the team wakes up in rough shape and hungover, with no idea how they ended up where they are.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: While on a visit to a small-town festival, Connor encounters the very first vampire, and finds himself fighting the clock to save himself from turning into one.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: When Vikram attempts to return to 1847 (via a homemade time machine), he inadvertently travels the entire team back to the days of King Arthur, where they learn the truth about a Knight of the Round Table, Camelot, and ... Elaine.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: When graffiti starts coming to life and threatening a teenage girl, the team have to work out how these strange events are related to Gregor's Hammer -- and the imminent return of Gregor himself.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: General Gregor retrieves the Sword of Mars and uses it to take over the country of Caucasylvia (remember from the Train episode), gaining control of their nuclear arsenal. The team must steal the Sword to prevent world calamity.
